note: M26 conversational suite (register line 97): exercises the REAL gaps the factoid set hid. KEY hidden bug (M16-style): user types tyre size in R-notation (205/55R16) but the priced corpus row uses slash (205/55/16) — same size, different surface form. Each price case asks in R-notation; ground-truth = bare digit price from the slash row. Covers existence, listing (CITYTRAXX product line — a real line in corpus), price-of-entity with LEADING ('Giá size X bao nhiêu') + TRAILING phrasing incl. 16-inch sizes, comparison, fuzzy (size typed with space/no-R), multi-turn follow-up, refusal-traps. Ground-truth lifted LITERALLY from live document_service_index / document_chunks: '185/55/15 ... 810000', '195/55/15 ... 963000', '205/65/15 ... 999000', '205/55/16 ... 1044000', '205/60/16 ... 1098000' (each price verified unique per size via psql). Refusal traps verified ABSENT: michelin = 0 chunks, mâm xe = 0 chunks (psql). expected_substrings = bare digit groups (format-agnostic).
